dialogueChunks.intro: It's over. The source of {quest_threat} has been destroyed, and people are coming back to themselves. The fog is lifting from their eyes.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The survivors are gathering. Some of them remember what they did. Others are being told. There's a lot of weeping in {location} tonight. {quest_ally} is tending to the wounded, but the deeper wounds aren't the kind bandages can fix.
dialogueChunks.outro: You gave us the truth, {player_name}. That's the first step. The healing will take longer. {target_npc} wants to establish a warning system so this can never happen again. We owe you more than words can say.

playerResponses.text: The truth was the least you deserved. Take care of each other.
Just make sure it doesn't happen again.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {quest_focus} is neutralized. But the cost... three more fell before you reached the source. Three more names to carve into stone.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} won't be using this weapon again, at least not here. {target_npc} has already begun analyzing what's left of {quest_item} to develop defenses. But the people who pulled the trigger on their own kin: they'll carry that weight forever.
dialogueChunks.outro: Some of the killers have asked to leave the settlement. They can't face the families of those they harmed. I don't know if that's cowardice or mercy. Either way, this place will never be the same.

playerResponses.text: They were victims too. Remember that when you judge them.
At least the enemy paid for what they orchestrated.
Some debts can only be paid in time.

dialogueChunks.intro: The killing has stopped. The mistrust hasn't. People flinch when their neighbors reach for a tool belt. It's quiet, but it's not peace.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} proposed a memorial for all who died: both those killed by the deception and those who did the killing without knowing. {target_npc} opposed it at first, but came around. They said naming the dead honestly might be the only way to stop the silence from rotting what's left of this community.
dialogueChunks.outro: You broke the curse, {player_name}. Now we have to live with what it did to us. That's the harder part, and it's ours to carry. Thank you for giving us the chance.

playerResponses.text: The memorial is a good start. Don't let grief turn to blame.
